title: FurCraft
description:
Client Side modpack for the fuzzy folk
Furry Minecraft Modpack
body:
# Furcraft
Furcraft is a client-side modpack that adds quality-of-life features, optimization, and skin customization mods to Minecraft for the furry community.

This modpack includes both [Ears](https://modrinth.com/mod/ears) and [CPM](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models), but it does not expose the latter's skin creator by default. Instead, it assumes that you already have a compatible skin.

If you want to make a skin for one of these mods, there are some resources here:
- [CPM Wiki](https://github.com/tom5454/CustomPlayerModels/wiki)
- [CPM Webeditor](https://tom5454.com/cpm/editor.html)
- [Ears Skin Manipulator](https://ears.y2k.diy/manipulator/)

Alternatively, there are a bunch of talented creators on the Discords of these mods who can make amazing skins!

This modpack is based on Fabulously Optimized, but it supports a different set of versions and has some minor mod differences. For example, it uses LambdaBetterGrass instead of BetterGrassify, as well as of course including the skin mods mentioned before!

## FAQ:
<details>
<summary>Why Not Figura</summary>
While Figura is a very good mod, it is not as well supported with newer versions as CPM is. 
With the official version, here on Modrinth, it only goes up to 1.21.4. I also do not have a skin to test for it, and with it being much more complicated than Ears, I did not feel confident in adding it. 

If someone wants to help include it in the versions where it would be available, feel free to reach out to me on the Git.
</details>



This modpack is

[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo)
